bench_setup.notes: Step 2 ADC/DAC loopback. DAC1_OUT1 (PA4) drives ≈1.65V mid-rail; ADC1_INP0 (PA0) reads back. Accepts 0x600..0xA00 (±25%). On FAIL: error_code bitmask: bit0=DAC_TIMEOUT, bit1=ADC_VREG, bit2=ADC_CAL, bit3=ADC_RDY, bit4=ADC_EOC, bit5=ADC_RANGE. On RANGE fail: detail0 holds raw ADC reading. ADC kernel clock = per_ck (HSI 64MHz) / 2 = 32MHz via RCC_D2CCIP1R.

peripheral_signals.notes: DAC channel 1 analog output. Wire: PA4 → PA0.
ADC1 channel 0 analog input. Wire: PA4 → PA0.
